en.extract:
The white-rumped cuckooshrike (Coracina leucopygia) is a species of bird in the family Campephagidae. It is endemic to Sulawesi, Indonesia.

The '''white-rumped cuckooshrike''' ('''''Coracina leucopygia''''') is a species of [[bird]] in the family [[Campephagidae]]. It is [[Endemism|endemic]] to [[Sulawesi]], Indonesia.

zh.extract:
白腰鹃鵙（学名：Coracina leucopygia）是山椒鸟科鸦鹃鵙属的一种，为印度尼西亚的特有种。
